analysis.summary: The technician successfully diagnosed and resolved a network connectivity issue on a Linux virtual machine ('iun-a1', IP 10.6.5.120) by adding a missing default gateway. Initial network performance was reviewed using `iperf`, and internet connectivity was established via `ping`. Post-fix, both internet and internal network throughput were verified, showing high speeds.
actions_taken: Examined network interface configuration using `ip a`.
Reviewed routing table using `ip route` to confirm missing default gateway.
Added a default gateway (`10.6.5.1`) using `sudo ip route add default via 10.6.5.1`.
Verified connectivity to the new default gateway with `ping 10.6.5.1`.
Performed an `iperf3` client test to an internal server (`10.6.9.120`) to confirm network throughput post-fix.
Briefly navigated through Cisco UCS Manager and VMware ESXi web interfaces.
Consulted ChatGPT for Nexus Switch Port-Channel configuration details.
issues_observed: Network unreachable error when trying to ping external IP (8.8.8.8).
Missing default route in the VM's routing table.
issues_resolved: Internet connectivity was restored for the virtual machine.
Connectivity to the internal network (10.6.9.120) was verified.
High network throughput (up to 29.2 Gbits/sec) was confirmed between the VM and an iperf server.
machines_touched: VM-B.1 (VM details observed on ESXi, IP: 10.6.5.121)
8.8.8.8 (Google DNS server, for external ping tests)
notable_events: The technician used `iperf3` to measure network performance before and after the routing fix, demonstrating a thorough approach to verification.
High network throughput (29.2 Gbits/sec) was achieved after resolving the routing issue, indicating successful optimization or troubleshooting of a high-speed link.
ChatGPT was consulted for Nexus switch port-channel configuration, suggesting the technician was using external resources for reference or complex configuration scenarios.

idle_gaps: 0:00 - 2:42 (162 seconds): Screen static on iperf output, mouse inactive. Technician likely reviewing previous results or waiting for the recording to properly initiate during observation.
tech_performance.efficiency_notes: The technician followed a logical and systematic troubleshooting path to diagnose and resolve the network connectivity issue. They efficiently utilized command-line tools and verified the fix thoroughly.
coaching_flags: The technician briefly switched to unrelated browser tabs (Cisco UCS Manager) at 2:42 and 8:44 without apparent interaction or purpose before quickly returning to the primary task. This could indicate minor distractions or accidental clicks.
